displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #53: The Last Gift From Alderaan!
synopsis: Princess Leia Organa and Captain Chedaki take a blockade runner to investigate Imperial activity in the Shiva system. As they board a shuttle for the surface, a space mine damages the ship and kills Chedaki, forcing Leia to launch the crippled shuttle to spare the rest of the crew. She crashes on Shiva IV and is attacked by a savage raiding party, only to be rescued by a group of natives led by Aron Peacebringer and Kéral Longknife. Leia returns with Aron to the capital, Illyriaqüm, and tries to warn him of the threat posed by the Galactic Empire, but the warlord does not believe such an empire exists. During a gala of Calian nobility, Aron and Leia are secretly captured by Imperial stormtroopers and brought before General Sk'ar as prisoners.
title: Star Wars (1977) #53: The Last Gift From Alderaan!
